kirundi.skip_count_overlay_multiplication_as_r: 🔢 Urwego rwo kubara usimbuka (kugwiza = kongera incuro nyinshi)
kirundi.distributive_property_a_b_c_a_b_a_c: 💡 Imiterere yo kugabanya: a × (b + c) = a×b + a×c
kirundi.break_multi_digit_numbers_into_tens_an: 💡 Tandukanya imibare myinshi mu makumyabiri n'imwe, ugwize buri kabiri, hanyuma wongere!
kirundi.b_per_row_per_group: B (kuri buri murongo / kuri buri tsinda)
kirundi.the_grid_is_the_picture_multiplication: Urusobe ni ifoto. Kugwiza ni imibare.
kirundi.pick_a_story_look_at_the_matching_grid: Hitamo inkuru. Reba urusobe ruhuye. Kugwiza ni ukubara ibintu mu kayira k'impande enye. Gukemura 5 bituma ubona ikirango 📝 Umurozi w'Ibibazo by'Amagambo.
kirundi.a_b_is_the_area_of_an_a_by_b_rectangle: a × b ni ubuso bw'akayira k'impande enye a na b. Iyi ni ikiraro kuva ku kubara usimbuka kugera ku kugwiza. Common Core 3.MD.7: huza ubuso no kugwiza no kongera.
kirundi.distributive_split_the_rectangle_keep_: Kugabanya — tandukanya akayira k'impande enye, ubike ubuso
kirundi.a_b_c_ab_ac_cut_a_4_7_grid_into_a_4_5_: a(b+c) = ab + ac. Ca urusobe rwa 4×7 mu 4×5 + 4×2; igiteranyo kimwe. Imiterere yo kugabanya ni urutirigongo rwa algebra rw'aguka kose gukurikira. Common Core 3.OA.5.
kirundi.break_factors_by_place_value_23_47_20_: Tandukanya ibice ukurikije agaciro k'umwanya: 23×47 = (20+3)(40+7) = 800 + 140 + 120 + 21 = 1081. Ikiraro kigana uburyo bw'urusobe, hanyuma algorithm isanzwe. Common Core 4.NBT.5.
kirundi.a_garden_with_4_rows_of_6_plants_a_the: Ubusitani bufite imirongo 4 y'ibimera 6. Ikinamico gifite imirongo 8 y'intebe 12. Buri kuri kw'ukuri kugwiza kubaho mu kayira k'impande enye k'isi nyayo. Common Core 3.OA.3, 4.OA.2.
kirundi.b_d_p_w_switch_mode_n_new_challenge_c_: ⌨️ B/D/P/W: hindura uburyo | N: ikibazo gishya | C: guhinduranya | ?: umwarimu wa AI
kirundi.distributive_property_a_b_c_ab_ac: 🔢 Imiterere yo kugabanya — a(b+c) = ab + ac
kirundi.sliders_for_rows_cols_discrete_4_state: Inyereza z'imirongo × inkingi. Icyiciro gitandukanye cy'imiterere 4. Nta manota, nta kugaragaza.
kirundi.hypothesis_when_does_area_rows_cols: Igitekerezo: ni ryari ubuso = imirongo + inkingi?
kirundi.find_sizes_where_area_perimeter_rare_i: Shaka ingano aho ubuso = umuzenguruko (imibare yuzuye idasanzwe).
kirundi.when_does_swapping_rows_cols_change_an: Ni ryari guhinduranya imirongo/inkingi bihindura ikintu?
kirundi.explain_commutative_property_area_leng: Sobanura imiterere yo guhinduranya + ubuso = uburebure × ubugari.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_4_state_classific: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: icyiciro gitandukanye cy'imiterere 4; nta manota y'ikizamini cy'ubuso; nta kugaragaza — ku bushake.
